SEE ALL SERVICES →

Who We Are

Powering Omaha, One Circuit at a Time

Powered Up Electric Inc. was founded in 2012 with a simple mission: to provide Omaha with dependable and fairly priced electrical services. We started small, wiring homes in Dundee and Aksarben, and quickly built a reputation for quality work and honest communication.

We believe in doing things right the first time. Our team emphasizes clear communication, meticulous workmanship, and a commitment to safety on every project. We treat every home and business as if it were our own, ensuring reliable and lasting electrical solutions.

As a locally owned and operated business, we're deeply invested in the Omaha community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to build lasting relationships with our clients. Our success is tied to the success of our neighbors, and we're proud to contribute to a brighter, more powered-up Omaha.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction
GET IN TOUCH →

Our Difference

Why Choose Powered Up Electric Inc.

Experienced Professionals

Our team consists of licensed and highly skilled electricians with years of experience in the Omaha area.

Reliable Service

We show up on time, prepared to get the job done right. Count on us for dependable electrical solutions.

Upfront Pricing

We provide clear and transparent pricing with no hidden fees. You'll know exactly what to expect before we start any work.

Safety First

We prioritize safety in every project, adhering to the highest industry standards and local codes.

Need Electrical Help?

Call Powered Up Electric Inc. today for a free consultation and experience the difference.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Powered Up Electric was fantastic! Our old electrical panel was outdated and causing problems. They upgraded it quickly and efficiently, and the price was very reasonable. We feel much safer now, especially with Omaha's summer storms.

Sarah M. Electrical Panel Upgrade
“

We had Powered Up Electric install new recessed lighting in our kitchen. The electrician was professional and did a great job. There was a small issue with one of the lights, but they came back promptly to fix it. Overall, very satisfied.

David B. Lighting Installation
“

Our power went out during a blizzard, and Powered Up Electric was the only company that answered the phone! They arrived quickly and fixed the problem in no time. We were so grateful for their prompt and reliable service.

Jennifer K. Electrical Repair
“

Powered Up Electric handles all of the electrical work for our business. They are always responsive, professional, and do excellent work. I highly recommend them to any business in the Omaha area.

Robert L. Commercial Electrical Services
“

We had Powered Up Electric install a whole-house generator, and it's been a lifesaver! We haven't had to worry about power outages since. The installation was smooth and professional, and they explained everything clearly.

Emily S. Generator Installation
“

I had several outlets that weren't working, and Powered Up Electric fixed them quickly and affordably. The electrician was friendly and knowledgeable. I would definitely use them again.

Michael T. Outlet Repair

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

How quickly can you respond to an electrical emergency?
We prioritize emergency calls and strive to respond as quickly as possible, often within the hour, depending on our current workload and your location in the Omaha metro area.
Are your electricians licensed and insured?
Yes, all of our electricians are fully licensed and insured, providing you with peace of mind and protection.
What types of electrical repairs do you handle?
We handle a wide range of electrical repairs, including wiring problems, outlet and switch issues, circuit breaker malfunctions, lighting repairs, and more.
